overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character leaving a market counter and walking through a sunlit Asian-inspired cyberpunk street decorated with red paper lanterns and neon signage toward a yellow booth with a large face poster.

scene_state.functional_zone: market stall counter overlooking cyberpunk street

events.description: begins walking forward from behind the counter into the open street

agents.ego_description: standing behind a market counter looking out at the street and distant booth

entered.detail: dark countertop with scattered magazines and papers in the immediate foreground
string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead along the street
large circular teal neon sign with purple 'WAGAN MARKET' text
yellow market stall with large vertical poster featuring a face
wooden slatted bench positioned near building entrance
short flight of stairs with metal railing leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from behind a market counter looking out onto a sunlit cyberpunk street. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while a neon 'WAGAN MARKET' sign glows on the right. In the distance, a yellow booth with a large face poster stands at the center of the street. The camera remains relatively static before beginning to move forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk market street with neon signage

events.description: exits the semi-covered counter area into the open market street with direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the market street toward the yellow booth with the face poster

notable_agents.action: standing at the yellow booth facing the street

entered.detail: large industrial gray recycling bin with multiple compartments

segments.scene_description: Moving from behind the counter into the open street, the camera walks toward the yellow booth as the surroundings open up to full sky exposure. The large trash bin comes into view in the center of the path before shifting to the left as the camera passes. The neon sign recedes into the background while approaching the NPC standing at the booth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the sheltered interior of a market stall into the bright, open expanse of a sunlit cyberpunk street. It begins from behind a market counter, looking out toward a distant yellow booth while red paper lanterns and a glowing neon WAGAN MARKET sign frame the view. As the camera moves forward and leaves the counter, the scene opens up to full sky exposure, causing the neon signage to recede into the background. The path then leads past a large trash bin in the center of the street before the camera shifts slightly to the left. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches an NPC standing beside the yellow booth and its large face poster.
